dc_gain_db.description: DC gain of the integrator (Gm × Rout)

output_swing_mv.description: Single-ended output swing from VCM before clipping (<1% THD)

leakage_mv_per_us.description: Output drift rate with zero input (integrator hold mode)

reset_time_ns.description: Time to reset output to VCM (within 1% of final value)

charge_inject_mv.description: Output voltage kick when reset switch opens (charge injection)
